dct_title_s: Generalkarte der Schweiz : Nach der topographischen Karte der Scheiz in 25 blatt durch das eidgenössische Stabsbüreau auf 4 Blatt reduzirt. Blatt II, Nordöstliches Viertel
dct_description_sm: Eidg. topographisches Büreau ; Gestochen von J. Goll, u. vollendet von H. Müllhaupt ; Eidgs. Strabsbureau.
Relief shown by hachures and spot heights
German and French legends, panels in German
Shows various sized towns, roads, railroads, churches, isolated buildings, mines, forts, monuments, waterways, borders, paths for "mulets" and "chars"
Panel shows small version of map, verso panel lists other maps
Includes Liechtenstein, and parts of Germany and Austria
"Les Signes et les Ecritures des noms des lieux varient suivant le nombre des habitans. Les Chiffres indiquent la hauteur en metres an dessus de la Mer" -- also in German
Stanford copy has red route lines; panel has signature "[T.]M. MacFarland 30/[93'] Zürich"
